creator: se@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is some kind of inconsistency on your system.

The -aout option has been removed from ldconfig, since a.out style executables have been mostly obsolete for more than a decade (but were still supported).

There is nothing in the ports system or in the ports you mention that references a.out anymore, and the error message indicates that "ldconfig -aout" has been invoked, which might be due to local changes or perhaps because of an an old pkg command version.

You could try "pkg -d upgrade" to produce a debug trace of the operations performed by the pkg command.
